## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope And Authorization

Link the authorized issue, repository scope, or security program rule.

## Security Impact

Explain whether this fixes, prevents, or documents a security risk.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] Manual review completed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data included

## Disclosure Notes

State whether any details should remain private until maintainers approve disclosure.
